clusters.name: agentic-dev-platform
clusters.label: agentic coding + memory infrastructure
clusters.description: Layers of agentic dev infra — JJHub is a jj-native forge for agent-generated code; Contexto manages memory/context for long-running agent processes; Bitrouter routes inference across agents. Together — a complete stack for building AI-native dev teams. Workshop candidate — "building with the agentic forge".

clusters.name: agents
clusters.label: agent runtime
clusters.description: Agent runtime stack — JJHub harness, Contexto context engine, Bitrouter routing, Conclave skills runtime. Composable; workshop candidate.

clusters.name: confidential-ai-ops
clusters.label: attestable LLM agents inside TEEs
clusters.description: Four teams run LLM agents (Claude, Llama, Mistral) inside Intel TDX or dstack TEEs with remote attestation. Prova targets healthcare prior-auth; DealProof targets negotiation; SignalStack targets privacy comms; Conclave targets confidential dataset evaluation. All share the "agent inside enclave" primitive and could benefit from unified attestation/logging infrastructure.

clusters.name: confidential-data
clusters.label: data procurement + attestation
clusters.description: Marketplaces where data buyers + sellers transact inside TEEs without revealing raw data. Prova provides TLSNotary-backed data integrity; DealProof adds dual-agent negotiation; TeeSQL + Tinycloud provide the storage and delegation primitives. Shared vertical surface — healthcare/research dataset procurement, confidential vendor negotiations.

clusters.name: crypto-id
clusters.label: crypto / identity research
clusters.description: Crypto + identity research axis — Pramaana lattice/ASC, Crossroads Liquefaction, WikiGen bio-cryptography. Could share an IC3 mentor pairing.

clusters.name: dstack
clusters.label: dstack / TEE-postgres
clusters.description: TEE Postgres axis — TeeSQL builds it, Abra integrates, Tinycloud + Conclave deploy.

clusters.name: ndai
clusters.label: NDAI lineage
clusters.description: Three teams share the NDAI paper — Conclave framework, Prova sandbox marketplace, DealProof dual-agent. Risk of stepping on each other; DealProof flagged Prova as collaboration target.

clusters.name: realtime-creative
clusters.label: voice-to-output generative stage
clusters.description: Three teams converge on a runtime — capture voice/context, process via agents (Contexto memory), output live generatives (Etherea). Tinycloud provides the sovereign data backbone. Natural demo-day artifact — accelerator uses this for live pitch backdrops and agent-assisted curation.

clusters.name: regulated
clusters.label: healthcare / regulated
clusters.description: Compliance-driven enterprise as a shared GTM target buyer — Prova EHR pilot, Abra SOC2/SOX, SignalStack privacy NGOs/journalists.

I like building across software and the physical world. My background includes furniture design, spatial design, woodworking, epoxy, power tools, and LED installation art.

Right now I am building an agentic personal feed and an agentic fundraising engine. I would be excited to pair on agent workflows, fundraising automation, applied AI interfaces, and projects that connect digital systems with physical experiences.

I also love music and coffee: I used to own a music venue where I hosted and ran sound for 300+ shows, and previously owned a coffee shop in Colorado.

clusters.name: agentic-dev-platform
clusters.label: agentic coding + memory infrastructure
clusters.description: Layers of agentic dev infra — JJHub is a jj-native forge for agent-generated code; Contexto manages memory/context for long-running agent processes; Bitrouter routes inference across agents. Together — a complete stack for building AI-native dev teams. Workshop candidate — "building with the agentic forge".

clusters.name: agents
clusters.label: agent runtime
clusters.description: Agent runtime stack — JJHub harness, Contexto context engine, Bitrouter routing, Conclave skills runtime. Composable; workshop candidate.

clusters.name: confidential-ai-ops
clusters.label: attestable LLM agents inside TEEs
clusters.description: Four teams run LLM agents (Claude, Llama, Mistral) inside Intel TDX or dstack TEEs with remote attestation. Prova targets healthcare prior-auth; DealProof targets negotiation; SignalStack targets privacy comms; Conclave targets confidential dataset evaluation. All share the "agent inside enclave" primitive and could benefit from unified attestation/logging infrastructure.

clusters.name: confidential-data
clusters.label: data procurement + attestation
clusters.description: Marketplaces where data buyers + sellers transact inside TEEs without revealing raw data. Prova provides TLSNotary-backed data integrity; DealProof adds dual-agent negotiation; TeeSQL + Tinycloud provide the storage and delegation primitives. Shared vertical surface — healthcare/research dataset procurement, confidential vendor negotiations.

clusters.name: crypto-id
clusters.label: crypto / identity research
clusters.description: Crypto + identity research axis — Pramaana lattice/ASC, Crossroads Liquefaction, WikiGen bio-cryptography. Could share an IC3 mentor pairing.

clusters.name: dstack
clusters.label: dstack / TEE-postgres
clusters.description: TEE Postgres axis — TeeSQL builds it, Abra integrates, Tinycloud + Conclave deploy.

clusters.name: ndai
clusters.label: NDAI lineage

clusters.name: realtime-creative

clusters.name: agents
clusters.label: agent runtime
clusters.description: Agent runtime stack — JJHub harness, Contexto context engine, Bitrouter routing, Conclave skills runtime. Composable; workshop candidate.

clusters.name: confidential-ai-ops
clusters.label: attestable LLM agents inside TEEs
clusters.description: Four teams run LLM agents (Claude, Llama, Mistral) inside Intel TDX or dstack TEEs with remote attestation. Prova targets healthcare prior-auth; DealProof targets negotiation; SignalStack targets privacy comms; Conclave targets confidential dataset evaluation. All share the "agent inside enclave" primitive and could benefit from unified attestation/logging infrastructure.

clusters.name: confidential-data
clusters.label: data procurement + attestation
clusters.description: Marketplaces where data buyers + sellers transact inside TEEs without revealing raw data. Prova provides TLSNotary-backed data integrity; DealProof adds dual-agent negotiation; TeeSQL + Tinycloud provide the storage and delegation primitives. Shared vertical surface — healthcare/research dataset procurement, confidential vendor negotiations.

clusters.name: crypto-id

clusters.description: Crypto + identity research axis — Pramaana lattice/ASC, Crossroads Liquefaction, WikiGen bio-cryptography. Could share an IC3 mentor pairing.

clusters.name: dstack

clusters.name: ndai
clusters.label: NDAI lineage
clusters.description: Three teams share the NDAI paper — Conclave framework, Prova sandbox marketplace, DealProof dual-agent. Risk of stepping on each other; DealProof flagged Prova as collaboration target.
